objective: Create pilot infrastructure — hardware profile schema, pilot run orchestrator script, and pilot plan documentation — in preparation for the physical multi-device pilot (M9).

pilot_schema: scripts/pilot/hardware-profile.schema.json — JSON schema with required fields: deviceName, os, cpu, ram, vram, runtimeProvider, availableModels, advertisedCapabilities, networkAddress
pilot_template: scripts/pilot/hardware-profile-template.json — operator-fillable template with placeholder values and _comment instructions
pilot_runner: Executes tracks via POST /tracks/run on the Local Brain
Collects timing metrics (total_duration_ms), relay_placement summary, per-step details
Writes per-run evidence JSON files and summary CSV to output directory
Auto-starts Local Brain if not already running
Verified working in local-only mode with mock provider (2/2 runs ok)
pilot_docs: docs/05-integrations/multi-device-pilot.md — pilot plan document covering prerequisites, hardware profile instructions, setup, run procedures for each policy mode, evidence collection, tear-down, known limitations, and stop conditions

results: hardware-profile.schema.json loads and validates with all 9 required fields
hardware-profile-template.json loads with all required keys
pilot-runner.js exports main, parseFlags, buildSummaryCsv, summarizeRelayPlacement
Pilot runner executed 2 runs in local-only mode against mock provider — both ok=true
Evidence JSON files contain: run_id, run_number, policy, workflow, total_duration_ms, ok, relay_placement, track_run_record_id, steps, provider, model
Summary CSV contains correct columns: policy, workflow, run_number, total_duration_ms, ok, relay_nodes_used
All 5 required test suites pass without failure
No existing files outside scope modified

passed: scripts/pilot/hardware-profile.schema.json exists with required fields (deviceName, os, cpu, ram, vram, runtimeProvider, availableModels, advertisedCapabilities, networkAddress)
scripts/pilot/pilot-runner.js runs without error in local-only mode against a running Local Brain (mock provider)
Pilot runner collects per-run timing metrics (total duration at minimum), relay_placement summary, and writes evidence JSON files
Pilot runner writes a summary CSV with one row per run including: policy, workflow, run_number, total_duration_ms, ok, relay_nodes_used
docs/05-integrations/multi-device-pilot.md exists covering prerequisites, setup, run procedures, evidence collection, and tear-down
package.json has pilot:local-only, pilot:local-first, pilot:distributed scripts
docs/07-progress/next-agent-brief.md updated with M9 pilot infrastructure status
No existing files outside the defined scope are modified

scope_notes: Infrastructure-only — pilot not executed on physical hardware
No modifications to existing test files
stop_conditions_honored: No modifications to existing test files under scripts/test-*.js or scripts/test-*.cjs
No actual hardware profiles created — only templates
No claim that pilot has been executed
No modifications to API response envelopes
last_fresh_validation: 2026-07-14 (pilot infrastructure verified — schema/template/runner all load correctly; pilot runner executed 2/2 runs ok in local-only mode with mock provider; all 5 required test suites pass)
next_milestones: Execute pilot on physical hardware with two devices; collect comparative evidence across local-only, local-first, and distributed policies
